Optimized Infrastructure

Grid Strategy

Supporting investors and developers with high-fidelity grid connection decisions. Navigate complexity with Revolt’s proprietary analytics engine.

BOOK A CALL TECHNICAL SPECS

Capabilities

Scope

Feasibility Mapping

Comprehensive spatial analysis of existing capacity and proximity to connection points.

Curtailment Modeling

Predictive risk assessment for energy export constraints across 10-year horizons.

Cost Optimization

Capex forecasting for contestable and non-contestable grid connection works.

Methodology

How it works

01

Data Ingestion

We integrate real-time grid data with historical load profiles to create a digital twin of your target region.

02

BESS Simulation

Our algorithms stress-test Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) configurations against multiple grid scenarios.

03

Strategic Roadmap

Receive a validated investment brief with prioritized connection sites and risk-adjusted returns.

Engineered for precision

Interactive Heatmaps

Visualize grid congestion patterns across the national network in real-time with sub-station granularity.

Rapid Siting

Reduce site identification time from weeks to seconds with our AI-driven GIS tools.

Ready to find your strongest grid position?

Use Gridscore to compare connection risk, capacity signals, and project viability before capital is committed.

REQUEST A SAMPLE REPORT
Revolt

Navigating grid access risks for BESS, renewables, and data centres through expert strategy and execution.
